# Event Announcement Context

This synthetic fixture produces a public event announcement from an approved event brief.

Work moves in order: source request → approval → publishing. A human approves the first-stage brief before publishing. Final copy must preserve the approved date, time, location, and capacity.

This fixture contains an intentional factual drift for `/picm-maintain trace` QA. Trace findings must remain heuristic and must not claim provenance-grade causality.
